executiveSummary: Today's AI picture is being shaped by open-source stack, frontier research, workflow orchestration. The strongest signals point to a market where research progress, platform controls, and workflow execution are converging into more operational buying criteria.
strategicTakeaways: The open-source layer is turning into a strategic option set for AI stack design, not only a hobbyist ecosystem.
Research matters most when it changes the product and deployment baseline, not only leaderboard positioning.
Execution architecture is becoming more important than one-shot generation quality in operational AI.
businessImpactSummary: This signal matters because it changes how teams in engineering can structure AI-assisted execution, evaluation, or governance. This signal matters because it changes how teams in strategy can structure AI-assisted execution, evaluation, or governance.
predictionUpdates: Platform competition will shift toward reliability, controls, and integration depth
Knowledge systems will become shared internal infrastructure rather than side projects
Multimodal systems will unlock more operational AI in physical workflows
